primary_dx_title: Postprocedural hemorrhage of a genitourinary system organ or structure following a genitourinary system procedure
ground_truth_dx_titles: Postprocedural hemorrhage of a genitourinary system organ or structure following a genitourinary system procedure
Removal of other organ (partial) (total) as the cause of abnormal reaction of the patient, or of later complication, without mention of misadventure at the time of the procedure
Unspecified place in unspecified non-institutional (private) residence as the place of occurrence of the external cause

ontology_routing.reasoning: The patient presents with heavy vaginal bleeding after a hysterectomy and a slightly low hematocrit, which suggests a gastrointestinal issue related to the surgical site.

candidates.rationale: Heavy vaginal bleeding after a hysterectomy and a low hematocrit strongly suggest a gastrointestinal bleed related to the surgical site.
